title: cynodon procumbens
intro: Cynodon procumbens, also known as the small bur grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cynodon procumbens include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and even alleviate symptoms of diabetes. In herbal preparations, Cynodon procumbens is often used in teas, infusions, and tonics to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in some traditional Asian remedies.
